data.title: RFK Jr. aide linked to wellness firm profiting from health savings accounts, while Trump pushed policies; Calley Means still led the company in 2021.
data.description: During the previous year, Calley Means continued to serve as the president of a company that heavily depended on health savings accounts. This occurred alongside the Trump administration's efforts to enhance these accounts through policy developments.

data.title: BitMine Immersion Technologies acquires $23 million worth of ETH from Ethereum Foundation in second purchase.
data.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies, a leading Ethereum treasury firm, recently completed its second purchase of ETH from the Ethereum Foundation. This transaction represents a significant investment in Ethereum, indicating confidence in the cryptocurrency. The specific amount of ETH acquired during this purchase was not disclosed, but the move underscores BitMine's continued interest in strengthening its position within the Ethereum ecosystem. This strategic investment aligns with BitMine's focus on leveraging Ethereum's potential for future growth and development.
